user.title: Add a YONGNUO light
user.description: Select the device address. The model is auto-detected from the Bluetooth broadcast name when available.

error.no_devices_found: No compatible YONGNUO light devices found. You can still enter a Bluetooth address manually.

init.title: Connection and channel
init.description: Set the BLE idle disconnect delay and the color-temperature channel configured on this specific lamp.
